display.name: Flexi, martin + geiss - painterly rogue wave strike
display.author: Flexi, martin + geiss

annotation.technical_notes: The preset renders solid, full-screen color fields that jump discretely between frames. These sudden state transitions are likely gated by beat detection on the bass attenuated of the music, triggering instant palette swaps. No spatial shaders, feedback samplers, or custom waves are active, resulting in a completely flat, minimalist presentation.

compatibility.note: capture was empty (24814 bytes); preset doesn't render meaningfully against the current test signal
